expect: PowerShell hosts gain wrappers for task_order/question_gen/dispatch_optimizer, MC-PORT recognizes them, and regression tests cover the new fallback path.
actual: Added 3 PowerShell wrappers for task_order, question_gen, and dispatch_optimizer. Synced SWARM plus 8 bridge files to advertise the native pwsh minimum-cycle fallback. Updated MC-PORT runtime checks and regressions. Verified on this host: the three new wrappers run from PowerShell via WSL-backed python3, and mission-constraint regressions pass 43/43.
diff: Expected wrapper parity plus MC-PORT coverage. Got that, and exposed bridge-sync drift across duplicated minimum-cycle instructions. Raw python aliases are still broken on this host, but swarm startup no longer depends on ad hoc bash knowledge.
